originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&__codec_hw_write_2` is never used.

sanitizedDescription: The value written to `&codec_hw_write` is never used.
presenceCondition:
(and (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210) CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210)
         CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210)
     (or (and (not CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210) CONFIG_I2C CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210)
         (and CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 CONFIG_I2C)))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_I2C () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SND_FSI_DA7210 () Bool
  true)
reasoning: 66517915e09.c L16: codec_hw_write dead store in da7210_init path. Pulse duplicate of TRANSFORMATION_31 (CSA). The PC simplifies to CONFIG_SND_SOC_DA7210 AND CONFIG_I2C (since FSI_DA7210 is a derived macro that implies SOC_DA7210, and the OR branches cancel), which is correctly constrained for the path where da7210 is selected but not via FSI. No restrictive library macros. New bug (no ERROR comment for this dead store). PC correctly constrained.
